$comment: Code<->Figma contract for SHADOWS (PEA-219 spacing+shadow). The 5 elevation levels (sm/md/lg/xl/2xl) are the app's warm, mode-aware values (code is the source of truth — it looks better than stock Tailwind). The Figma 'shadows' collection holds matching per-attribute tokens (x/y/blur/spread + color) composed into the shadow-sm/md/lg/xl/2xl effect styles, mode-aware (light/dark). check_shadow_drift.mjs asserts the app's TWO shadow definition sites stay equal to these values: desktop/src/index.css (:root + .dark, the shadcn/Storybook scope) and desktop/src/styles/tokens.css ([data-theme=light|dark], the legacy app scope). To refresh after an intentional change: edit both sites + this file together. shadow-xs/2xs are folded into sm; xl/2xl were re-added in the hardening pass for modal/drawer/overlay components that previously fell back to stock Tailwind.
